name: fist-items-icon-ui
description: Verify original avatar preservation, five closed-fist item tiers, starter ownership, coin-funded upgrade purchase, themed icon HUD, modal menu behavior, and icon feedback.

steps.label: wait for fist shop and HUD

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local decor=root.Polish["City Decor"] local result={count=0,allClosed=true,noBlades=true,allIcons=true,names={}} for _,internal in ipairs({"Boxing Glove","Iron Knuckle","Thunder Fist","Titan Gauntlet"}) do local palm=decor:FindFirstChild(internal.." Gauntlet Palm") local plate=decor:FindFirstChild(internal.." Armory Nameplate") local knuckles,wedges,icons=0,0,0 for _,d in ipairs(decor:GetChildren()) do if d.Name:find(internal,1,true) and d.Name:find("Closed Knuckle",1,true) then knuckles+=1 end if d:IsA("WedgePart") and d.Name:find(internal,1,true) then wedges+=1 end end if plate then for _,d in ipairs(plate:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Image=="rbxassetid://104014193600358" then icons+=1 end end end result.count+=palm and 1 or 0 result.allClosed=result.allClosed and palm~=nil and palm.Shape==Enum.PartType.Ball and knuckles==4 result.noBlades=result.noBlades and wedges==0 result.allIcons=result.allIcons and icons==2 table.insert(result.names,plate and plate:FindFirstChild("Title",true) and plate:FindFirstChild("Title",true).Text or "") end return H:JSONEncode(result)

steps.label: armory displays four distinct closed fists with icons

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local fist=p.Character:FindFirstChild("Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet") local knuckles,mutations,tails,wedges=0,0,0,0 for _,d in ipairs(fist:GetDescendants()) do if d.Name:find("Closed Knuckle",1,true) then knuckles+=1 elseif d.Name:find("Mutation",1,true) then mutations+=1 elseif d.Name:find("Kaiju Tail",1,true) then tails+=1 elseif d:IsA("WedgePart") then wedges+=1 end end local atlasIcons,actionIcons,tabIcons,rowIcons=0,0,0,0 for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Image=="rbxassetid://104014193600358" then atlasIcons+=1 if d.Name=="ActionIcon" then actionIcons+=1 elseif d.Name=="TabIcon" then tabIcons+=1 elseif d.Name=="RowIcon" then rowIcons+=1 end end end local compact=game:GetService("UserInputService").TouchEnabled or workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize.Y<520 local titleResponsive=g.StatsPanel.Title.Visible==not compact return H:JSONEncode({closed=fist:GetAttribute("ClosedFist"),tier=fist:GetAttribute("Tier"),display=fist:GetAttribute("DisplayName"),knuckles=knuckles,mutations=mutations,tails=tails,wedges=wedges,atlasIcons=atlasIcons,actionIcons=actionIcons,tabIcons=tabIcons,rowIcons=rowIcons,menuIcon=g.MenuButton:FindFirstChild("MenuIcon")~=nil,objectiveIcon=g.ObjectiveCard:FindFirstChild("ObjectiveIcon")~=nil,targetIcon=g.TargetWallHUD:FindFirstChild("TargetIcon")~=nil,title=g.StatsPanel.Title.Text,titleResponsive=titleResponsive})

steps.label: starter fist and themed mobile HUD preserve original avatar

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g.GameMenu.Visible=true task.wait(.15) local hidden=not g.HeroStatusDeck.Visible and not g.ObjectiveCard.Visible and not g.MobileControls.Visible and not g.MenuButton.Visible g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab","Fists") task.wait(.25) local tabsOK=true for _,n in ipairs({"FistsTab","PetsTab","TasksTab","SettingsTab"}) do local b=g.GameMenu.Tabs[n] tabsOK=tabsOK and b:FindFirstChild("TabIcon")~=nil and b.AbsoluteSize.X>=80 end local productIcons=0 for _,d in ipairs(g.GameMenu.Content:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Name=="ProductIcon" and d.Image=="rbxassetid://104014193600358" then productIcons+=1 end end g.GameMenu.Visible=false task.wait(.1) local restored=g.HeroStatusDeck.Visible and g.LeftHeroNavigation.Visible and g.RightHeroNavigation.Visible and g.MobileControls.Visible and not g.MenuButton.Visible return H:JSONEncode({hidden=hidden,tabsOK=tabsOK,rowIcons=productIcons,restored=restored})

steps.label: icon menu behaves as a clean mobile modal

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Coins=500}) local buy=c:Invoke("BuyFist","Boxing Glove") return H:JSONEncode({ok=buy.ok,coins=buy.Coins,equipped=buy.EquippedFist,owned=buy.OwnedFistsJSON,mult=buy.FistMultiplier})

steps.label: coins purchase and auto-equip the next fist tier

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local label=g.StatsPanel:FindFirstChild("EquippedFist",true) local icon=label:FindFirstChild("StatIcon") local fist=p.Character:FindFirstChild("Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet") return H:JSONEncode({text=label.Text,x=icon.ImageRectOffset.X,y=icon.ImageRectOffset.Y,tier=fist:GetAttribute("Tier"),display=fist:GetAttribute("DisplayName"),style=fist:GetAttribute("FistStyle")})

steps.label: equipped item updates fist model and HUD icon

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local icons=0 for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Name=="FeedbackIcon" and d.Image=="rbxassetid://104014193600358" then icons+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({type=g:GetAttribute("LastFeedbackType"),icons=icons})

steps.label: shop notification uses themed icon feedback
